## LibraryData.ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams.encryption property

Optional encryption configuration for decrypting encrypted collection files. If not provided, encrypted files will be treated as regular JSON (and likely fail validation).

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly encryption?: IEncryptionConfig;
```
